title: One AntiCheat
description: AI Anti-Cheat for Minecraft 1.8-1.21.8 with smart auto-config, ML detection, zero false flags, and Bedrock support.
body:
# BIG UPDATE COMING V1.2.1 WILL BE BETTER

# Server Hosting I use daily to test is https://witherhosting.com/
🛡️ Advanced AI Anti-Cheat System for Minecraft 1.8-1.21.8

AntiSystem v1.2.0 is a next-generation, AI-powered anti-cheat plugin featuring advanced machine learning detection engines, deep neural networks, and intelligent behavioral analysis. Designed for maximum protection with zero false positives across all supported Minecraft versions.

🎯 Advanced Detection Capabilities

• **Movement Analysis**: Flight, speed, reach, teleportation, and sophisticated movement pattern detection
• **Combat Intelligence**: Kill aura, auto-clicker, reach hacks, and combat automation prevention  
• **Behavioral AI**: Deep learning behavioral analysis with adaptive pattern recognition
• **Inventory Protection**: Advanced inventory exploit detection and item duplication prevention
• **Cross-Platform**: Seamless Java and Bedrock player support with platform-specific optimizations
• **Bypass Prevention**: ML-powered detection of sophisticated cheat bypasses and obfuscation

🧠 Machine Learning Engine

• **Deep Neural Networks**: Multi-layer perceptron with advanced feature extraction
• **Ensemble Learning**: Combines multiple ML models for superior accuracy
• **Anomaly Detection**: Isolation Forest algorithm for detecting unusual behavior patterns
• **Gradient Boosting**: Advanced ensemble method for high-precision classification
• **Adaptive Decision Trees**: Self-optimizing decision trees that learn from server data
• **Real-time Learning**: Continuous model updates based on live player behavior

🔧 Enhanced Staff Tools

• **ML-Powered Analytics**: Advanced staff monitoring with AI-driven insights
• **Smart Alert System**: Intelligent violation notifications with confidence scoring
• **Performance Dashboards**: Real-time server performance and detection metrics
• **Behavioral Insights**: Deep analysis of player patterns and anomaly detection
• **Clean Console Output**: Spam-free logging with intelligent message filtering

🚀 Revolutionary Features

• **Intelligent Configuration**: Manual configuration with ML-optimized default settings
• **Zero False Positives**: AI-trained thresholds eliminate innocent player punishment
• **Performance Optimized**: Advanced resource management with minimal server impact
• **Cross-Platform Excellence**: Full Java and Bedrock compatibility with touch/controller detection
• **Database Flexibility**: SQLite (default) and MySQL support with automatic optimization
• **Version Compatibility**: Full support for Minecraft 1.8 through 1.21.8

📁 Configuration Structure

The plugin uses 5 optimized configuration files:
• **config.yml**: Core settings with advanced ML configurations
• **bedrockac.yml**: Bedrock-specific detection with touch/controller AI
• **staff.yml**: Staff management with ML-enhanced analytics
• **reasons.yml**: AI-powered violation categorization with smart recommendations
• **plugin.yml**: Plugin metadata and command definitions

⚙️ System Requirements

• **Server**: Spigot/Paper 1.8-1.21.8 (or compatible forks)
• **Java**: Version 8 or higher
• **Memory**: Minimum 512MB allocated for ML processing
• **Optional**: Geyser/Floodgate for enhanced Bedrock support
• **Database**: SQLite (included) or MySQL for large networks

🔄 Recent Updates (v1.2.0)

• Extended Minecraft version support up to 1.21.8
• Implemented advanced deep neural network detection
• Added ensemble learning models for improved accuracy
• Enhanced Bedrock player detection with touch/controller AI
• Streamlined configuration from 6 files to 5 optimized files
• Improved ML feature distribution across configuration files
• Enhanced staff analytics with behavioral insights
• Optimized performance for large server networks
